Who We Are

Labour law practitioners who build technology

iNRECO Consulting was founded by Casper Badenhorst, a South African labour law practitioner and IR consultant with extensive experience representing employers at the CCMA, drafting disciplinary codes, and managing complex IR matters across multiple sectors.

We noticed a gap. Employers — especially SMEs — were making costly mistakes not because they didn't care about compliance, but because they couldn't access expert guidance fast enough. So we built the tools we wished existed.

⚖️
Practitioner-built accuracy
Every AI response is grounded in a knowledge base built by a qualified SA labour consultant — not scraped from the internet.
🔒
Privacy by architecture
Zero-storage systems built intentionally. Your employees' data never touches our servers.
🇿🇦
SA-specific, SA-first
LRA, BCEA, EEA, OHSA, CCMA procedure, sectoral determinations — South African law only.
"We built LabourFlow and VERDIQT because every South African employer deserves the kind of guidance that used to cost R2 500 an hour — available in their pocket, 24 hours a day."
— Casper Badenhorst, Founder · iNRECO Consulting

Can I dismiss for theft first offence?
🔴 Yes — gross misconduct.
Dismissal on first offence justified. Still conduct a fair disciplinary hearing.
LRA Sched 8BCEA S37

Consulting Services

When you need a human expert

iNRECO Consulting provides direct labour law advisory and representation services to employers across South Africa. Our tools handle the daily workload — we handle the complex matters.

CCMA representation — conciliation and arbitration
Disciplinary hearing chairing and facilitation
Retrenchment consulting — S189 / S189A process
Employment contracts and disciplinary codes
CCMA bundle preparation and arbitration packs
Strike management and union relations
White-label platform licensing for employer associations

iNRECO Consulting and its products provide AI-assisted labour law guidance. This is not legal advice. For complex disputes or CCMA matters, always engage a qualified South African labour law practitioner. iNRECO products do not store user data or employee information on their servers.
